ai_announcements.headline: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
ai_announcements.summary: Etsy is now available as a native conversational shopping app inside ChatGPT, signaling further OpenAI app-platform expansion into commerce.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Pinterest's visual discovery and shopping ads benefit from generative/visual AI; not directly displaced by ChatGPT app integrations. Move likely driven by earnings/results, not this announcement.
research_pointers: Check if PINS reported earnings today - move size suggests company-specific catalyst, not AI news sympathy
Verify ad revenue / MAU trends vs. ChatGPT shopping threat narrative

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: IAC's Dotdash Meredith and other content properties face AI traffic disintermediation, but content licensing deals (incl. with OpenAI) provide partial offset.
research_pointers: Likely earnings-driven not AI-news driven; check IAC Q1 print
Falsifier: if IAC reported in-line/beat, the selloff is decoupled from this AI news

ai_announcements.headline: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant with reduced hallucination in law/medicine/finance
ai_announcements.summary: New default ChatGPT model with lower hallucination rates in regulated verticals.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Duolingo's gamification, streak mechanics, and structured curriculum are not replicated by raw chatbots; Duolingo itself uses AI (Max tier) to expand TAM. However, free conversational practice via GPT is a real long-tail competitive pressure.
research_pointers: Move likely earnings-driven (DUOL reports around this date) more than GPT-5.5 news
Check DAU/bookings guidance and Max attach rate
Falsifier: if guidance was raised, AI-fear narrative is the marginal issue not core

ai_announcements.headline: PayPal pitches AI-led turnaround tied to $1.5B savings
ai_announcements.summary: PayPal frames itself as a 'technology company again' with AI-driven automation and restructuring.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Shift4's merchant acquiring/integrated payments business is not displaced by PayPal's AI cost-cutting narrative; sympathy/sector pressure at most. Likely earnings-driven.
research_pointers: Check FOUR Q1 results / guidance — 5-day -11.9% suggests company-specific issue not AI
Falsifier: if FOUR missed/cut guide, the move is fundamentals not AI sympathy

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Most large moves in the market_data set (DOCN +36%, IPGP -27%, CYTK +17%, OSIS -16%, ADEA -13%, DUOL -10%, AEIS -9%, FOUR -7%, KBR -7%, AVAV -7%, KTOS -6%) appear to be earnings/company-specific catalysts rather than reactions to today's AI announcements. The AI news flow is incremental (GPT-5.5 Instant, Etsy-in-ChatGPT, PayPal AI cost story) with no obviously mispriced AI-driven selloffs. No Anthropic-specific announcements in this batch. Quiet night for AI-news-driven dislocations.
